title: halenia parviflora
intro: Halenia parviflora, also known as Small-flowered Halenia or Small-flowered Himalia, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Halenia parviflora include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Halenia parviflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
